## Summary
- What changed:
- Why:

## Branch Flow Checklist
- [ ] Base branch is `staging` for feature work.
- [ ] If base branch is `main`, source branch is `staging`.
- [ ] No direct feature merge to `main`.
- [ ] Conflicts resolved locally before requesting review.

## Quality Checklist
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes.
- [ ] `npm run test` passes.
- [ ] UI tested on desktop and mobile breakpoints.

## Risk / Breaking Changes
- List any migration steps, env var changes, or API changes.
